name: HongGuang Lighting Holdings Company Limited
summary: HongGuang Lighting Holdings Company Limited, an investment holding company, designs, develops, manufactures, and sells light-emitting diode (LED) beads and LED lighting products in the People's Republic of China. It offers candle, flood, bulb, spot, down, oyster, and panel lights, as well as tube and torch. The company also provides subcontracting services. It serves manufacturers of backlight LED modules/panels, LCD panels, and other electronic products, as well as a trading company. The company was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Zhuhai, the People's Republic of China.
